title: 截图画廊增强
summary: Task 1 (AC1 - View Toggle) correctly implemented with comprehensive tests. The commit accurately scopes itself to view toggle functionality only. Remaining tasks (AC2-AC5) are pending per the story file.

issues.description: parseContent() truncates non-JSON content to 30 chars, but AC5 specifies 50 chars for AI summary display
issues.recommendation: Change content.substring(0, 30) to content.substring(0, 50) to match AC5 spec

issues.description: Story status field still shows 'ready-for-dev' but Task 1 is complete. Should be 'in-progress' or have a partial completion status
issues.recommendation: Update Status field to reflect partial completion

strengths: Comprehensive test coverage: 10 test cases specifically for AC1 with clear test groupings
Proper Vue 3 Composition API usage with <script setup> syntax
TailwindCSS-only styling with custom theme colors (bg-primary, bg-darker, text-gray-*)
Responsive grid layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 for 3-column adaptation
Clear active state highlighting: bg-primary for active button, bg-darker for inactive
formatTimeShort function provides compact HH:MM:SS format for list view
Tests properly mock Tauri invoke and ScreenshotModal component
